scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = 'node_modules/paralleljs/lib/parallel.js'; if(fs.existsSync(file)){ let content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'); content = content.replace(/const Worker = isNode \? require\(.* : self\.Worker;/g, 'const Worker = self.Worker;').replace(/\? require\('os'\)\.cpus\(\)\.length/g, '? 4').replace(/const isNode = !\(typeof window !== 'undefined' && this === window\);/g, 'const isNode = false;'); fs.writeFileSync(file, content); }"
